tech_news.title: After weeks of hype, Crimson Desert debuts to high player counts but "Mixed" Steam reviews, citing "disjointed graphics", lovable cats, "awful" UI and more - Eurogamer

tech_news.title: 10 tried-and-true methods to stay off your phone, according to our readers - NPR
tech_news.description: We asked our audience to share the creative ways they limit their own phone use. They range from the practical (keep your phone in another room) to the creative (pair your phone with a fun paperback).

tech_news.title: Microsoft: March Windows updates break Teams, OneDrive sign-ins - BleepingComputer

tech_news.title: AI is changing the style and substance of human writing, study finds - NBC News
